creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
It's a known issue as it has hit on me too some weeks ago. I wanted to get  
many patches from Ubuntu Linux and put in our ports tree. But, I don't  
have any of printer in my hand anymore. So... Are you willing to test it  
for me when I am finishing with take patches from Ubuntu Linux?

Cheers,
Mezz


--
